content.en:
In the vault of mysteries.

Ye Tian continued to check all kinds of materials and secret techniques, and his knowledge was constantly broadened.

He learned more and more about the boundary river.

Time passed slowly, and almost all of the secret art classics here were browsed by Ye Tian.

And at this time, Ye Tian finally knew what the black long river connected in the Origin Realm was.

"Black Silent Sea!"

Strictly speaking, the Black Sea is not a real sea, but a special being, it has no consciousness, no intelligence, no talent, but it can move slowly, in the boundary river.

And the favorite thing of the Black Silent Sea is to devour the Eternal Realm, if there is a gap or gap in the Eternal Realm, the Black Silent Sea will invade the Eternal Realm, devouring the origin of the Eternal Realm, the long river of time, and the empty sea, thus completely destroying an Eternal Realm.

At that time, there is no way for the Eternal Masters to stop it.

Because the Eternal Master cannot destroy and destroy the Black Silent Sea, the Black Silent Sea is almost at the same level as the Boundary River in terms of life, but the area is very small.

"No wonder, the Eternal Master wants to use that gray mountain range as a seal to resist the Black Silent Sea, if it really allows the Black Silent Sea to enter the Void Zone, the Void Region will slowly erode and be completely destroyed. "

"The creature with the mastery-level Destruction Ancestral Endowment is supposed to come from the Boundary River, and wants to pass through that entrance and enter the Void Zone, but can't. "

At this time, Ye Tian was happiest that he knew about the existence of the Boundary River, and the Boundary River was afraid that there were some creatures with control-level ancestral endowments, if he encountered these creatures, he could copy the control-level ancestral endowments on their bodies, and the benefits would be too much for him.

In the future, he can easily create a half-step space-time control technique, if he copies the control-level time ancestor or the control-level space ancestor, then his speed of space-time fusion will soar many times, and he can cultivate space-time fusion to the peak realm faster, and he can completely become the fourth-level peak legend realm lord.

At present, he is only a peak Legendary Realm Lord whose combat power has reached the fourth level, and the realm has still not been reached.

Subsequently.

He looked at the information about the Boundary River given by the white-bearded old man again, and this information told a lot about the Boundary River, which was not available in the secret art library.

For example, the power divisions in the boundary river, some important locations, and so on.

The Eternal Realm is a haven for the Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and the Boundary River is dangerous, and it is normal to fight, and even if you meet an Eternal Master, the other party will kill you if you are in a bad mood.

As a result, the Peak Legendary Realm Lord could easily fall in the Boundary River.

However, some Eternal Masters have built a city in the boundary river to protect the creatures in the city, as long as they pay some fees, they can enter the city to cultivate or live, even if they encounter enemies, they can also ensure safety in the city.

And there is a unique currency in the Boundary River - the Boundary River Coins, this currency is owned by an incomparably large force of the Boundary River - the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce, this Chamber of Commerce is very ancient, and the Boundary River Coins issued by it are recognized by all the eternal controllers.

As a result, the Boundary River Coin became the only currency in the Boundary River.

Coins are cryptographically crafted from the Eternal Master, and the materials used are inherently expensive enough to be circulated.

And if you want to enter those safe megacities, you must pay the Boundary River Coins.

The Temple of Eternity also has a business of exchanging Realm River Coins, which can be exchanged from the Machine Spirit only by paying some resources.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian exchanged one hundred Boundary River Coins from the Machine Spirit, which was also the largest amount allowed to be exchanged, after all, the Eternal Hall was just to make it easier for the Peak Legendary Realm Lord to enter the Boundary River for the first time, and instead of making money from this, naturally he would not exchange it in large quantities.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was going to take a trip to the Boundary River.

And if you want to wander in the Boundary River, it is better to have a place to stay, and those giant cities with good reputations in the Boundary River are the best places to stay, although it will waste some Boundary River coins, but at least it is safer.

For many peak Legendary Realm lords, the cost of a clone falling is also very high, and it takes a long time to enter the Boundary River again, so the loss is too great.

Although Ye Tian didn't care about the fall of the copy body, he also needed to know real-time information, and only in the giant city could he get more information, so he also needed to find a giant city as a place to stay.

Thereupon.

Ye Tianlai asked the white-bearded old man.

Sunrise Mountain.

Ye Tian came to visit the white-bearded old man again.

After seeing the white-bearded old man, Ye Tian sincerely asked: "White-bearded old man, I'm going to go to the Jiehe, I don't know which giant city to go to?"

The white-bearded old man said: "The boundary river is too big, and there are five giant cities that are relatively close to the eternal realm of the Void Region, I suggest you go to the Qinglian Giant City." "

"Qinglian Giant City? Could it be the giant city built by the Qinglian master?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The white-bearded old man nodded: "Yes, it is the creator of the Qinglian Holy Land, the Qinglian Master, her strength is much stronger than the ordinary controllers, so she built the Qinglian Giant City, and there are three eternal controllers in our Void Region who are in the Qinglian Giant City, and one of my clones is also in the Qinglian Giant City." Of course, another giant city, Xuanheng Giant City, is also a good choice, and the Stygian Sea Controller, one of the three major city lords of Xuanheng Giant City, is also from the Hall of Eternity. "

Master of the Stygian Sea!

Ye Tian felt that this name was very familiar, and after thinking about it carefully, he finally knew where he had heard this name.

A long time ago, when he used the three thousand iris to go back to the past to comprehend the ancient desolate monument of time and space, two eternal masters appeared, one of them was called the Silver Demon, and the other was called the Stygian Sea.

In the end, the Stygian Sea took away the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space.

The white-bearded old man said again: "Endless Lord, although there are more than a dozen Eternal Masters in our Void Region, some of them also have some minor contradictions with each other, some of them are only in the Eternal Palace, and there are only six Eternal Masters who really develop the Eternal Hall and cultivate the reserve with their hearts. Both the Blue Lotus Master and the Stygian Sea belong to the Eternal Masters who are dedicated to the development of the Eternal Temple. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly, feeling that it was also very normal, all the Eternal Controllers were really working together, so it was not normal!

He thought about it carefully and decided to go to Qinglian Giant City, at least there were more controllers in the Void Region, and if he went there, he should be able to be blessed.

After leaving Xuyang Mountain, a copy of Ye Tian's body passed through the Eternal Hall and headed for the Boundary River.

Inside the Temple of Eternity.

Airplanes!!!

A space-time gate appeared, Ye Tian walked in, and soon entered a space-time tunnel.

In an instant, he broke through the Eternal Realm barrier in the Void Region and entered a long blue river.

And this long blue river is the Boundary River, and many eternal realms are in the Boundary River.

Soon, the teleportation ended, and he entered the Boundary River.

When I looked back, a huge eternal realm was behind me, and there was an area covered by a black ocean, and that was the Black Silent Sea.

The Boundary River does not do much harm to cultivators, basically the Legendary Realm Lord can fly in the Boundary River, but the Black Silent Sea is terrifying, even if it is the peak Legendary Realm Lord, once touched, it will have to turn into ashes.

Ye Tian would not die to touch the Black Silent Sea, so he turned around and flew away, shuttling through the boundary river at an extremely fast speed.

This time, his destination was Qinglian Giant City, which was a bit far from here, and at his speed, it would take about six years to fly to Qinglian Giant City.

In the blink of an eye, six years have arrived.

An incomparably majestic giant city appeared in front of Ye Tian's eyes.

This giant city is the Qinglian Giant City!
